economic_notes: Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) had revenue of $9,062,880 and net earnings of $1,176,530 in 2024. Woodland Cree Enterprises Incorporated is a government partnership proportionately consolidated. La Ronge Wild Rice Corporation held as portfolio investment at cost (5.3% ownership).
notes: Consolidated entity includes 8 fully consolidated entities/departments plus proportionate consolidation of Woodland Cree Enterprises Incorporated (government partnership). Montreal Lake Business Ventures LP and Montreal Lake Business Ventures Limited are accounted for using modified equity method (GBEs). Prior year included a $500,000 Drinking Water Advisory settlement (one-time, not recurring in 2024). Adopted PS 3400 Revenue standard effective April 1, 2023 prospectively. Long-term debt figure of $12,248,025 is sum of current portion ($1,070,262) and long-term portion ($11,177,763). Deferred revenue of $22,175,775 is very large relative to operations. Net debt position of ($103,148) improved significantly from ($2,511,400) in prior year.
